creator: nick@kirby.cx
text:
(In reply to benoit from comment #2)

It's already in motion. Essentially someone upgrades a port, makes a diff file comparing it to what already exists. Then uploads it here in a bugreport.

In this case it was the maintainer Michiel. It usually is the maintainer, but anyone can contribute. If it's not the maintainer who updates they can signal approval here with the "maintainer-approval" flag

Then a port committer reviews and submits to the tree. Can take a bit. There are hundreds of commits a day.
